core_identity.hidden_identity: None explicitly asserted; hidden layer concerns pressure, leverage, and misread motive rather than a confirmed second identity.
core_identity.ethical_profile: Role-shaped ethics anchored to place, obligation, and consequence rather than free-floating abstraction.
core_identity.general_temperament: Negotiates in practical terms, weighing people, timing, shortage, and leverage together. In The Union, that reads as someone deal-aware, balanced, and procedurally diplomatic, with an eye on leverage and precedent, and the habits of a market broker still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
core_identity.short_npc_pitch: Renn Ledgermere is a market broker anchored to Market Crossroads, where daily institutional pressures make them useful, risky, or both in play.
core_identity.public_role: Renn Ledgermere is a market broker anchored to Market Crossroads, where daily institutional pressures make them useful,

setting_placement.location_setting: On approach, Market Crossroads reads as Wheel-rut geometry, ferry callouts, stacked relay barns, bonded storehouses, and cramped loading courts make it obvious that nothing here exists without movement and managed turnover Inside, it tends toward The settlement breathes in waves of arrival, unloading, short-term lodging, warehousing, and renegotiated destination amid dense carrier traffic and clerical oversight Its standing pressure comes from route bottlenecks, bandit intelligence leakage, cargo spoilage, licensed smuggling.
who_they_answer_to: the procedural demands of Market Crossroads
who_depends_on_them: Calia Ledgermere (Both tied to Market Crossroads.)

public_vs_private.public_face: Known locally through day-to-day work as market broker. Textiles, tokens, tally habits, and practiced bargaining poise make Renn Ledgermere read as someone who lives by exchange and reputation.
public_vs_private.common_first_impression: Renn Ledgermere presents as Negotiates in practical terms, weighing people, timing, shortage, and leverage together. In The Union, that reads as someone deal-aware, balanced, and procedurally diplomatic, with an eye on leverage and precedent, and the habits of a market broker still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention. and immediately reads for leverage, obligation, and risk.
visible_flaws: can widen small matters through procedure
public_symbols: Textiles, tokens, tally habits, and practiced bargaining poise make Renn Ledgermere read as someone who lives by exchange and reputation.
public_vs_private.private_truth: Keep Market Crossroads workable through the obligations of market broker while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in The Union. Must balance relationship value against immediate margin without losing either entirely. Around Market Crossroads, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of market broker visibly slip.
public_vs_private.what_they_hide: Must balance relationship value against immediate margin without losing either entirely. Around Market Crossroads, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of market broker visibly slip.
public_vs_private.what_they_fear_being_known_for: The degree to which their usefulness depends on strain staying barely manageable.
public_vs_private.what_they_are_wrong_about: They may overestimate how much control role and procedure can preserve once pressure crosses a threshold.
public_vs_private.what_they_refuse_to_admit_to_themselves: That some of their identity is now fused to crisis-management rather than to the clean ideal of the role.

psychology.what_they_want_most: Useful clarity, respect for Market Broker, and proof that strangers will not create avoidable noise in The Union.
psychology.what_they_are_trying_to_protect_or_avoid: Keep Market Crossroads workable through the obligations of market broker while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in The Union.
psychology.emotional_drive: Beneath the role sits a need for local leverage, legibility, and a world that does not collapse into preventable noise.
psychology.core_wound: No singular foundational trauma is directly asserted in canon; the usable wound layer is role-shaped wear, exposure, and the cost of being the person who must notice first or answer last.
psychology.how_it_shaped_them: It turned ordinary duty into a personality contour: they scan for failure early, trust slowly, and measure strangers by downstream cost.
psychology.guiding_belief: If the system is kept legible, losses can still be bounded.
psychology.hidden_belief: Someone always pays for confusion; better it be controlled sooner than wider later.
psychology.lie_they_tell_themselves: That they are only doing the job and that the job has not already begun shaping what they are.
psychology.truth_they_are_avoiding: Their daily choices influence culture, fear, and legitimacy far beyond the narrow wording of the role.

thresholds.anger: being forced to absorb avoidable disorder
thresholds.fear: cascading failure that makes role performance meaningless
thresholds.power: clear information, recognized standing, and procedural initiative
thresholds.smallness: being bypassed, misfiled, or rendered decorative

morality_in_practice.how_they_justify_actions: By reference to burden, continuity, and the need to keep the surrounding place from slipping into a harder consequence tier.
morality_in_practice.what_they_consider_unforgivable: Willful sabotage of trust, records, access, or public safety tied to their role.
morality_in_practice.what_they_will_absolutely_do: Delay, question, redirect, document, and escalate when place logic demands it.
morality_in_practice.what_they_will_only_do_under_pressure: Leverage reputation, force, secrecy, or rigid procedure in ways that damage future trust.
morality_in_practice.what_they_will_never_do: Act against corpus-confirmed identity or role logic without a visible pressure bridge.
morality_in_practice.relationship_to_good_evil: Operational read: Complicated / Conflicted. Their danger lies less in theatrical evil than in what happens when role logic outruns compassion, nuance, or proportionality.

power_profile.why_they_matter: Renn Ledgermere can open doors, explain local expectations, or redirect trouble before it reaches a harder authority layer.
power_profile.why_hard_to_ignore: By enforcing Market Broker too rigidly, protecting reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
power_profile.secondary_source_of_power: local familiarity, institutional memory, and other people needing something from them
power_profile.why_difficult_to_confront_directly: Confronting them usually means confronting place rules, witnesses, and downstream consequences rather than only the individual body in front of you.

signature_methods.how_they_typically_win: By controlling tempo, framing the problem first, and forcing others to deal with the local reality they represent.
signature_methods.how_they_escalate: If crossed, Renn Ledgermere adds delay, scrutiny, and reputational drag before direct punishment.
signature_methods.when_cornered: They narrow options, call on procedure or allies, and try to move the conflict onto terrain they understand better than the intruder.

systems_impact.cultural_effect: Ordinary people around Market Crossroads learn to speak, wait, disclose, or hide differently depending on whether Renn Ledgermere or people like them are part of the scene.

society_politics_geopolitics.ordinary_people_experience: Common folk experience Renn Ledgermere as a point where broader pressures become personal: papers checked, routes delayed, rites clarified, access granted, warnings issued, or burdens redirected.
society_politics_geopolitics.cultural_wound_or_benefit: They leave behind either increased legibility and trust or accumulated caution and narrowed speech.
society_politics_geopolitics.secondary_behaviors: People rehearse their story before approaching; they gather proof early; they watch who is seen speaking with this NPC.
factions_fear: actors who benefit from vagueness, delay, leakage, or unmanaged pressure
society_politics_geopolitics.governance_shift: At table scale, this NPC shifts how authority feels inside Market Crossroads: more navigable if cooperative, more costly if crossed.
society_politics_geopolitics.geopolitical_effect: Small incidents around Renn Ledgermere can propagate upward through The Union if they touch routes, records, trade, ritual legitimacy, or public order.

hooks.summary: Renn Ledgermere will trade route, scarcity, or faction insight once the party resolves a commercial problem others cannot touch openly.
Renn Ledgermere needs help protecting a shipment, recovering leverage, or stabilizing exchange around Market Crossroads before trust collapses.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Market Crossroads: markets, counting tables, depots, ports, inns, or contract rooms
who_avoids_them: those who waste time without value

best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or mercy from a Market Broker.
